infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: SpeakSmart needs access to speech recognition to analyze your pronunciation and provide feedback.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SpeakSmart needs microphone access to record your speech for language practice.
